inputs.prompt: Newsletter: The Craft. Subscribers: 4,200 active. Open rate: 52%. Click rate: 6.1%. Cadence: Weekly, Tuesday. Audience: Freelance writers and journalists, mid-career, mostly US and UK. Placements offered: Top-of-newsletter featured sponsor (logo + 80-word description), mid-newsletter text mention (40 words), classified ad at the bottom (job listings, tools, services).
Newsletter: Weekend Reader. Subscribers: 2,100. Open rate: 44%. Cadence: Weekly. Audience: Book lovers. Placements: Single sponsor mention per edition.

Newsletter: European Housing Watch. Subscribers: 7,800 active (out of 9,200 total). Open rate: 48%. Click rate: 4.8%. Cadence: Fortnightly, Monday. Audience: EU policy professionals, housing researchers, urban planners, journalists — 60% Brussels-based, 25% other EU capitals, 15% international. Placements: Lead sponsor (logo + 100 words + link), mid-edition text integration (50 words), event listing (conferences, webinars, calls for papers).
